---
title: "Projets"
pagetitle: "Projects"
description: "Une sélection de projets data, finance et économie sur lesquels j'ai travaillé."
listing:
  - id: projects
    contents: "**/*/index.qmd"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: "240px"
    fields: [image, title, description, categories]
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: unnumbered
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    page-size: 30
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
comments: false
toc: false
body-class: page-projects
---

::: {#projects}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
(function () {
  function applyLayout() {
    // Filet de sécurité : forcer la classe sur <body> au cas où
    // body-class du frontmatter n'est pas honoré.
    document.body.classList.add("page-projects");

    var listing = document.getElementById("projects");
    var categories = document.querySelector(".quarto-listing-category");
    if (!listing || !categories) return;

    // Déplace le bloc filtres juste avant la grille
    if (listing.parentNode !== categories.parentNode) {
      listing.parentNode.insertBefore(categories, listing);
    } else {
      // Même parent → on insère avant la grille
      listing.parentNode.insertBefore(categories, listing);
    }

    // Renomme le bouton "Tous" / "All"
    categories.querySelectorAll(".category").forEach(function (el) {
      var t = (el.textContent || "").trim();
      if (t === "All" || t === "Tous" || el.dataset.category === "") {
        el.textContent = "Tous";
      }
    });
  }

  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", applyLayout);
  } else {
    applyLayout();
  }
})();
</script>
```
